title: Is Slay the Spire 2 on Game Pass?
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
Is Slay the Spire 2 coming to Game Pass? If you're keen to jump into Mega Crit's follow-up to the ever-popular roguelike deckbuilding game, here's whether you can grab it on Game Pass.

Slay the Spire 2 is currently in early access, but there's still a ton of content available, from unlocking all five characters with ten Ascension levels per character to mastering each class, including the Regent. If you can't wait until the full release of the game, here's whether you can get Slay the Spire 2 on Microsoft's subscription service.

Read the rest of the story...
